items.name: issue-writer
items.title: Issue Writer
items.description: Turn a rough bug report, idea, or complaint into a well-formed, actionable issue - investigating the codebase first to add reproduction steps, expected vs actual behaviour, suspected location, and acceptance criteria - then filing it with gh or emitting paste-ready markdown. Use when the user says "file an issue for this", "write this up", describes a bug in passing that should be tracked, or wants a feature request made concrete.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
